codex.acceptance: GET /v1/health returns ok and no standalone frontend is required.
codex.operator_action: Start Skill Mode or the published Docker image with local secrets outside Study Anything.

codex.acceptance: deployment-hardening-verification-v1 confirms Skill Mode, published image, source build, and fallback guidance are aligned.
codex.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/verify_deployment_hardening.py --check and use diagnose_adoption.py if Docker, GHCR, ports, paths, or Agent endpoints fail.

codex.acceptance: learning-enrichment-bridge-verification-v1 confirms all enrichment source types, HTML artifact structure, strict second-brain privacy, and platform pack evidence.
codex.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/verify_learning_enrichment_bridge.py --check before claiming NotebookLM, Obsidian, or HTML micro-lesson handoff works.

codex.acceptance: agent-eval-marketplace-enforcement-v1 confirms native gates, optional external judges, required-mode failures, timeout diagnostics, baseline regression, and redacted platform evidence.
codex.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/verify_agent_eval_marketplace_enforcement.py --check before claiming external judge or marketplace eval readiness.

codex.acceptance: platform-adoption-feedback-diagnostics-v1 and platform-feedback-package-v1 confirm import errors, version drift, missing commands, endpoint health, and redacted local feedback are aligned.
codex.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/verify_platform_adoption_feedback_diagnostics.py --check and python3 scripts/generate_platform_feedback_package.py --check before sharing adoption failures.

codex.acceptance: public-support-status-v1, public-maintainer-dashboard-v1, and public-status-linkage-fixture-v1 confirm only labels, commands, schema names, fixture hashes, and release readiness are publishable.
codex.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/generate_platform_public_support_status.py --check and python3 scripts/verify_platform_public_support_status.py --check before publishing maintainer status.

codex.acceptance: published-image-evidence-v1 and published-image-evidence-fixture-v1 confirm manifest platforms, docker-images workflow, local pull-timeout fallback, optional remote smoke replay, and release-blocking classifications are metadata-only.
codex.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/generate_published_image_evidence.py --check and python3 scripts/verify_published_image_evidence.py --check before public handoff.

codex.acceptance: adopter-evidence-archive-v1 and adopter-evidence-fixture-v1 confirm release proof, checksums, Docker manifest evidence, known limitations, and maintainer handoff are metadata-only.
codex.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/generate_adopter_evidence_archive.py --check and python3 scripts/verify_adopter_evidence_archive.py --check before public handoff.

codex.acceptance: release-asset-adoption-v1, release-asset-adoption-fixture-v1, and release-asset-adoption-proof-v1 confirm required release zip assets, digest checks, adoption-pack manifest hashes, and replay classifications are metadata-only.
codex.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/generate_release_asset_adoption.py --check and python3 scripts/verify_release_asset_adoption.py --fixture fixtures/release-asset-adoption/asset-only-pass.json --asset-dir platform/generated --runtime metadata-only before telling platform operators to use GitHub Release assets.

codex.acceptance: platform-field-adoption-rehearsal-v1 and platform-import-failure-fixture-v1 confirm Kimi, Codex, WorkBuddy, generic OpenAPI rehearsals, import quirks, and mock failure fixtures are actionable and redacted.
codex.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/generate_platform_field_rehearsal.py --check and python3 scripts/verify_platform_field_rehearsal.py --check before asking external users to try a platform import.

codex.acceptance: The platform can create/import context, run learning, answer, and fetch mastery.
The shared transcript contains audit/eval/export schemas, not raw source, answers, endpoints, or keys.

kimi.acceptance: GET /v1/health returns ok and no standalone frontend is required.
kimi.operator_action: Start Skill Mode or the published Docker image with local secrets outside Study Anything.

kimi.acceptance: deployment-hardening-verification-v1 confirms Skill Mode, published image, source build, and fallback guidance are aligned.
kimi.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/verify_deployment_hardening.py --check and use diagnose_adoption.py if Docker, GHCR, ports, paths, or Agent endpoints fail.

kimi.acceptance: learning-enrichment-bridge-verification-v1 confirms all enrichment source types, HTML artifact structure, strict second-brain privacy, and platform pack evidence.
kimi.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/verify_learning_enrichment_bridge.py --check before claiming NotebookLM, Obsidian, or HTML micro-lesson handoff works.

kimi.acceptance: agent-eval-marketplace-enforcement-v1 confirms native gates, optional external judges, required-mode failures, timeout diagnostics, baseline regression, and redacted platform evidence.
kimi.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/verify_agent_eval_marketplace_enforcement.py --check before claiming external judge or marketplace eval readiness.

kimi.acceptance: platform-adoption-feedback-diagnostics-v1 and platform-feedback-package-v1 confirm import errors, version drift, missing commands, endpoint health, and redacted local feedback are aligned.
kimi.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/verify_platform_adoption_feedback_diagnostics.py --check and python3 scripts/generate_platform_feedback_package.py --check before sharing adoption failures.

kimi.acceptance: public-support-status-v1, public-maintainer-dashboard-v1, and public-status-linkage-fixture-v1 confirm only labels, commands, schema names, fixture hashes, and release readiness are publishable.
kimi.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/generate_platform_public_support_status.py --check and python3 scripts/verify_platform_public_support_status.py --check before publishing maintainer status.

kimi.acceptance: published-image-evidence-v1 and published-image-evidence-fixture-v1 confirm manifest platforms, docker-images workflow, local pull-timeout fallback, optional remote smoke replay, and release-blocking classifications are metadata-only.
kimi.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/generate_published_image_evidence.py --check and python3 scripts/verify_published_image_evidence.py --check before public handoff.

kimi.acceptance: adopter-evidence-archive-v1 and adopter-evidence-fixture-v1 confirm release proof, checksums, Docker manifest evidence, known limitations, and maintainer handoff are metadata-only.
kimi.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/generate_adopter_evidence_archive.py --check and python3 scripts/verify_adopter_evidence_archive.py --check before public handoff.

kimi.acceptance: release-asset-adoption-v1, release-asset-adoption-fixture-v1, and release-asset-adoption-proof-v1 confirm required release zip assets, digest checks, adoption-pack manifest hashes, and replay classifications are metadata-only.
kimi.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/generate_release_asset_adoption.py --check and python3 scripts/verify_release_asset_adoption.py --fixture fixtures/release-asset-adoption/asset-only-pass.json --asset-dir platform/generated --runtime metadata-only before telling platform operators to use GitHub Release assets.

kimi.acceptance: platform-field-adoption-rehearsal-v1 and platform-import-failure-fixture-v1 confirm Kimi, Codex, WorkBuddy, generic OpenAPI rehearsals, import quirks, and mock failure fixtures are actionable and redacted.
kimi.operator_action: Run python3 scripts/generate_platform_field_rehearsal.py --check and python3 scripts/verify_platform_field_rehearsal.py --check before asking external users to try a platform import.

kimi.acceptance: The platform can create/import context, run learning, answer, and fetch mastery.
The shared transcript contains audit/eval/export schemas, not raw source, answers, endpoints, or keys.

workbuddy.acceptance: WorkBuddy-style inline learning workspace sees its own entrypoints and privacy boundary.
workbuddy.operator_action: Open platform/packs/workbuddy/README.md and pack.json from the adoption pack.

workbuddy.acceptance: Tool names start with study_anything_ and map to local HTTP endpoints only.
